caption: A news broadcast features a split-screen presentation discussing political developments. The layout includes portrait images of various politicians alongside a central image of a man in a white shirt standing before a large building. A graphic displays "2019 लोक सभा" and "कुल सीटें 42," with a "कांग्रेस" logo and the number "02." The header text transitions from "2024 में" in the first frame to "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' ह" and then "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" across subsequent frames. Politicians listed in side panels include "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार," "विजय चौधरी," "डिप्टी CM सब्रत चौधरी," "विजय सिंदा," "बिजेन्द्र यादव," and "श्रवण कुमार." A red ticker at the bottom eventually displays the text "नीतीश कुमार ने 9वीं बार CM पद की शपथ." The time "10:08 PM" is visible in the bottom right corner of every frame, alongside a news channel logo.
